message:
Apply rustfmt formatting and flatten Active branch match arm in buffer

adaptive_hedge.rs:
- Collapse multi-line assert! macro into single line (rustfmt)

io/mod.rs:
- Alphabetize module declarations (read before read_buf, read_line after)

service/buffer.rs:
- Reformat long WaitingForReady destructure onto multiple lines
- Fix trailing whitespace
- Flatten Active arm: collapse match-inside-match into direct
  match arm using `=> match` syntax, reducing one nesting level
- No behavioral changes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
